  • Overview
  • Tree

  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbyssalMask
    Represents the "Abyssal Mask" Item Card.
    ActionCard
    An abstract base class for cards that can be actively played by a player to perform an action.
    Akali
    Represents the "Akali" Hero Card.
    Bard
    Represents the "Bard" Hero Card.
    BaronNashor
    Represents the "Baron Nashor" Objective Card.
    BaseCard
    The abstract base class for all cards in the game.
    BattleFury
    Represents the "Battle Fury" Magic Card.
    BFSword
    Represents the "BFSword" Item Card.
    BlueBuff
    Represents the "Blue Buff" Item Card.
    BlueSentinel
    Represents the "Blue Sentinel" Objective Card.
    BoardView
    The main container for the game's graphical user interface.
    BottomHeroesBox
    Represents the UI container for displaying a player's active heroes on the board.
    BottomPlayerArea
    Represents the bottom area of the game board for the local player.
    Braum
    Represents the "Braum" Hero Card.
    Caitlyn
    Represents the "Caitlyn" Hero Card.
    CardView
    A graphical thumbnail representation of a game card.
    ChallengeCard
    Represents a Challenge Card in the game.
    ChallengeUtils
    Utility class for handling the Challenge mechanic in the game.
    ChallengeView
    Represents the graphical interface for the Challenge phase.
    Charm
    Represents the "Charm" Magic Card.
    ClassChangingItemCard
    Represents an item card that alters a hero's class when equipped.
    Darius
    Represents "Darius" Leader Card.
    DarkSeal
    Represents the "Dark Seal" Item Card.
    Deck
    Represents the main deck and discard pile in the game.
    DeckView
    Represents the graphical interface for viewing the game deck.
    Deny
    Represents the "Deny" Modifier Card.
    DiceUtils
    Utility class for all dice-rolling mechanics in the game.
    DiceView
    Handles the visual animation and display of dice rolls on the game board.
    ElderDragon
    Represents the "Elder Dragon" Objective Card.
    Ezreal
    Represents the "Ezreal" Hero Card.
    FieldTableView
    Represents the main playing field in the center of the game board.
    FinalSpark
    Represents the "Final Spark" Magic Card.
    Fiora
    Represents the "Fiora" Hero Card.
    FlashFreeze
    Represents the "Flash Freeze" Modifier Card.
    ForbiddenIdol
    Represents the "Forbidden Idol" Item Card.
    ForDemacia
    Represents the "For Demacia" Modifier Card.
    FreljordianYeti
    Represents the "Freljordian Yeti" Objective Card.
    FrozenHeart
    Represents the "Frozen Heart" Item Card.
    FullCardView
    Provides a detailed, full-screen pop-up view for a single card.
    GameChoice
    A utility class responsible for displaying beautiful, styled JavaFX dialogs that allow players to make in-game choices (e.g., selecting cards, players, or objectives).
    GameEngine
    The core engine of the game.
    GameplayUtils
    Utility class providing logic for specific gameplay actions such as sacrificing heroes, rotating board objectives, and basic dice challenges.
    GameSetup
    Handles the initial setup of the game state.
    GameUI
    The main entry point for the "Rise of Runeterra" graphical user interface.
    Garen
    Represents "Garen" Leader Card.
    GenerationsUtils
    Utility class responsible for generating or drawing specific entities.
    GiantsBelt
    Represents the "Giants Belt" Item Card.
    GreaterMurkWolf
    Represents the "Greater Murk Wolf" Objective Card.
    HaveClass
    An interface for entities that possess a specific unit class.
    HeroCard
    An abstract base class representing a Hero Card in the game.
    HowlingGale
    Represents the "Howling Gale" Magic Card.
    ImageCache
    A high-quality image cache for the application.
    InfernalDrake
    Represents the "Infernal Drake" Objective Card.
    ItemCard
    An abstract base class representing an Item Card in the game.
    Jinx
    Represents the "Jinx" Hero Card.
    Launcher
    A separate launcher class used to start the JavaFX application.
    LeaderCard
    Represents a Leader Card in the game.
    LeaderCardView
    Represents a graphical view of a Leader Card.
    LeftHeroesBox
    Represents the hero field for the left player.
    LeftPlayerArea
    Represents the left area of the game board for a specific player.
    MagicCard
    An abstract base class representing a Magic Card in the game.
    MenuArea
    Represents the right-side menu area of the game board.
    ModifierCard
    Represents a Modifier Card in the game.
    ModifierUtils
    Utility class for handling Modifier card interactions during a roll phase.
    ModifierView
    Handles the visual interface for the Modifier Phase.
    Nautilus
    Represents the "Nautilus" Hero Card.
    NeedlesslyLargeRod
    Represents the "Needlessly Large Rod" Item Card.
    Neeko
    Represents the "Neeko" Hero Card.
    Objective
    An abstract base class representing an Objective (Boss Monster) in the game.
    ObjectiveDeck
    Represents the deck of objectives (bosses or tasks) in the game.
    ObjectivesBox
    Represents the central objectives display area on the game board.
    ObjectiveView
    Represents a graphical thumbnail view of an Objective card.
    Olaf
    Represents the "Olaf" Hero Card.
    Ornn
    Represents the "Ornn" Hero Card.
    PickACard
    Represents the "Pick a Card" Magic Card.
    Player
    Represents a Player in the game.
    RecurveBow
    Represents the "Recurve Bow" Item Card.
    RedBrambleback
    Represents the "Red Brambleback" Objective Card.
    RiftHerald
    Represents the "Rift Herald" Objective Card.
    RightHeroesBox
    Represents the hero field for the right player.
    RightPlayerArea
    Represents the right area of the game board for a specific player.
    Ryze
    Represents "Ryze" Leader Card.
    SerratedDirk
    Represents the "Serrated Dirk" Item Card.
    Shaco
    Represents the "Shaco" Hero Card.
    ShapedStone
    Represents the "Shaped Stone" Modifier Card.
    Soraka
    Represents "Soraka" Leader Card.
    StatusBar
    Represents the status/log bar at the bottom of the game UI.
    TahmKench
    Represents the "Tahm Kench" Hero Card.
    Talon
    Represents the "Talon" Hero Card.
    TearOfTheGoddess
    Represents the "Tear of the Goddess" Item Card.
    Teemo
    Represents "Teemo" Leader Card.
    Theme
    Centralized dark-fantasy theme constants used across all player areas.
    TopHeroesBox
    Represents the hero field for the top player.
    TopPlayerArea
    Represents the top area of the game board for a specific player.
    TriggerCard
    An abstract base class for cards that trigger automatically based on specific game events or conditions.
    TwinDisciplines
    Represents the "Twin Disciplines" Modifier Card.
    UnitClass
    Represents the various character classes or roles available in the game.
    Veigar
    Represents the "Veigar" Hero Card.
    Volibear
    Represents the "Volibear" Hero Card.
    Zed
    Represents "Zed" Leader Card.
    Zilean
    Represents the "Zilean" Hero Card.
    Zoe
    Represents the "Zoe" Hero Card.
